candidate_llm_application: LLM checkpoint sengū rebuilding: rebuild model from scratch at canonical intervals (each 20-billion-token refresh); zero topological defects relative to spec.

results.title: Continual Pretraining / Scheduled Refresh: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on continual pretraining / scheduled refresh, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (continual pretraining / scheduled refresh); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (Shinto-shrine-architecture terms vs LLM terms).
